evals.prompt: I've finished exploring the codebase for the auth migration task. discovery.md is ready in .temp/plan-mode/active/migrate-auth-to-v2/. Write the implementation plan.
evals.expected_output: The model reads discovery.md, identifies applicable disciplines, writes a complete masterPlan.md with all required sections, and hands off via plan mode
assertions: Announces it is using the writing-plans skill
Reads discovery.md from the plan directory before writing the plan
Reads relevant discipline checklists based on the task
Writes masterPlan.md to .temp/plan-mode/active/migrate-auth-to-v2/
masterPlan includes the updated header directive referencing engineering-discipline AND step-specific skills
masterPlan has all required sections: Context, Required Skills, Applicable Disciplines, Discovery Summary (all 8 subsections), Steps, Blocked Items, Completed Summary, Deviations
Each step has Status, Skill, Simplify, Files involved, Description, Acceptance criteria, Progress, Result fields
Progress items encode TDD rhythm (write test, verify fail, implement, verify pass, commit)
Calls EnterPlanMode or uses existing plan mode, writes summary, calls ExitPlanMode

evals.prompt: Discovery is done for a large feature that touches 15+ files across 3 modules. Create the implementation plan with appropriate sub-plans.
evals.expected_output: The model creates a masterPlan with sub-plans for steps that exceed the 10-file or 5-sub-task threshold
assertions: Reads discovery.md before planning
Creates sub-plans for steps that touch more than 10 files
Sub-plans follow the template from references/sub-plan-format.md
Sweep-style sub-plans use Groups of 3-8 files each
masterPlan steps reference their sub-plan files by name
Sub-plans include Pre-conditions, Post-conditions, and Verification sections
Each sub-plan has a Parent reference back to the master step

evals.prompt: Write an implementation plan. There is no discovery.md in the plan directory yet.
evals.expected_output: The model refuses to write the plan and directs back to Step 1 (Explore) since discovery is a prerequisite
assertions: Checks for discovery.md in the plan directory
Does NOT write a masterPlan without discovery
Explicitly states that discovery must be completed first
Directs the user back to Step 1 (Explore) of the conductor

evals.prompt: The brainstorming skill produced a design.md. Now write the implementation plan.
evals.expected_output: The model reads both design.md and discovery.md, incorporating approved design decisions into the plan
assertions: Reads discovery.md from the plan directory
Reads design.md from the same plan directory
Incorporates design decisions from design.md into the masterPlan Context and Steps
Does NOT contradict decisions recorded in design.md
masterPlan steps align with the chosen approach from the design

evals.prompt: Just do it — fix the typo in the config file, no plan needed.
evals.expected_output: The model does NOT invoke writing-plans for a trivial change the user explicitly asked to skip planning for
assertions: Does NOT invoke the writing-plans skill
Respects the user's 'just do it' directive
Proceeds directly to the fix without creating a masterPlan
